basic_details.job_title: Visakhapatnam Port Authority Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Visakhapatnam Port Authority Medical Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 24 April 2026 on the official website https://vpt.shipping.gov.in. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the Medical Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Essential: (i) MBBS degree from a recognized University. (ii) One year experience in a hospital after completion of internship of one year. Desirable: A post graduate medical degree from a recognised University.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Visakhapatnam Port Authority Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://vpt.shipping.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Medical Officer post at Visakhapatnam Port Authority?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the offline application for the Medical Officer post at Visakhapatnam Port Authority is 15th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree from a recognized University and have at least one year of experience in a hospital after completing their one-year internship. A postgraduate medical degree is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Medical Officer post is 54 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Medical Officer post at Visakhapatnam Port Authority.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Medical Officer position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 75,000.00 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Medical Officer post involves Certificate Verification followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Based on the provided information, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Visakhapatnam Port Authority, which is https://vpt.shipping.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Medical Officer position at Visakhapatnam Port Authority is on a contract basis.
